sentences.text: O fată tânără vine la noi.
sentences.original: A young woman comes to us.
Her name is Violet Marsh.
She wants to speak with Poirot.

sentences.text: — Am o problemă mare, spune ea.
sentences.translationRu: — У меня большая проблема, говорит она.
sentences.original: I have a big problem, she says.
I need your help.
Tell me everything, says Poirot.

sentences.text: — Am avut un unchi, spune Violet.
sentences.translationRu: — У меня был дядя, говорит Вайолет.
sentences.original: I had an uncle, says Violet.
His name was Andrew Marsh.
He died a month ago.
My parents died long ago.
My uncle took me in.
I lived on his farm.
My uncle was a strange man.

sentences.text: — Spunea că femeile nu sunt deștepte.
sentences.translationRu: — Он говорил, что женщины не умны.
sentences.original: He said women are not clever.
But I wanted to study.

sentences.translationRu: — Я показала ему, что он ошибается.
sentences.original: I showed him he was wrong.
Now my uncle has died.
He left a strange will.

sentences.text: — Pot să locuiesc în casă un an, spune ea.
sentences.translationRu: — Я могу жить в доме один год, говорит она.
sentences.original: I may live in the house for one year, she says.

sentences.text: — În acest an trebuie să fiu deșteaptă.
sentences.translationRu: — За этот год я должна быть умной.
sentences.original: In that year I must be clever.
I must show my wits.

sentences.text: — Dacă reușesc, casa și banii sunt ai mei.
sentences.translationRu: — Если справлюсь, дом и деньги мои.
sentences.original: If I succeed, the house and money are mine.

sentences.text: — Dacă nu reușesc, totul merge la săraci.
sentences.original: If I fail, everything goes to the poor.

sentences.text: — Dar nu știu ce trebuie să fac, spune Violet.
sentences.translationRu: — Но я не знаю, что должна делать, говорит Вайолет.
sentences.original: But I do not know what I must do, says Violet.

sentences.text: — Poate este un alt testament în casă.
sentences.translationRu: — Может быть, в доме есть другое завещание.
sentences.original: Maybe there is another will in the house.
Please, help me find it.
Poirot smiles.

sentences.text: — Este o problemă interesantă, spune el.
sentences.original: It is an interesting problem, he says.
I will help you.

sentences.text: A doua zi mergem la fermă.
sentences.translationRu: На следующий день мы едем на ферму.
sentences.original: The next day we go to the farm.
The house is old and big.
It is in Devon, in the country.
Two servants live in the house.
They are Mr. and Mrs. Baker.

sentences.text: Au lucrat mulți ani pentru unchi.
sentences.translationRu: Они много лет работали на дядю.
sentences.original: They worked many years for the uncle.
Tell me about the will, says Poirot.

sentences.text: — Stăpânul m-a trimis în oraș, spune Baker.
sentences.translationRu: — Хозяин послал меня в город, говорит Бейкер.
sentences.original: The master sent me to town, says Baker.

sentences.text: — Am cumpărat două hârtii pentru testament.
sentences.translationRu: — Я купил две бумаги для завещания.
sentences.original: I bought two will-forms.

sentences.text: — Stăpânul a scris pe o hârtie.
sentences.original: The master wrote on one form.

sentences.text: — Eu și soția mea am semnat.
sentences.original: My wife and I signed it.

sentences.text: — Apoi stăpânul a spus: Am greșit.
sentences.original: Then the master said: I have made a mistake.
He tore up the first form.

sentences.text: — A scris din nou pe a doua hârtie.
sentences.translationRu: — Он снова написал на второй бумаге.
sentences.original: He wrote again on the second form.

sentences.text: — Noi am semnat încă o dată.
sentences.original: We signed once more.
And after that? asks Poirot.

sentences.text: — Stăpânul a plecat în oraș, spune Baker.
sentences.translationRu: — Хозяин ушёл в город, говорит Бейкер.
sentences.original: The master went to town, says Baker.

sentences.text: — A spus că trebuie să plătească negustorii.
sentences.original: He said he had to pay the tradesmen.
Very interesting, says Poirot quietly.

sentences.text: Acum Poirot caută în toată casa.
sentences.translationRu: Теперь Пуаро ищет по всему дому.
sentences.original: Now Poirot searches the whole house.
He looks in every room.
We enter the uncle's study.
There is an old desk there.
Poirot looks at the keys.

sentences.text: Fiecare cheie are o etichetă curată.
sentences.original: Each key has a clean label.
But one key is different.
It is the key of the desk.

sentences.text: Pe ea este un plic murdar.
sentences.original: On it there is a dirty envelope.

sentences.translationRu: На конверте написано: Ключ от стола.
sentences.original: On the envelope it says: Key of the Desk.
Poirot suddenly stops.

sentences.translationRu: — А! говорит он. Теперь я понимаю!
sentences.original: Ah! he says. Now I understand!
All the keys have clean labels.

sentences.text: — Numai aceasta are un plic murdar.
sentences.original: Only this one has a dirty envelope.
Poirot opens the envelope.
Inside, the envelope seems empty.

sentences.text: — Nu este nimic aici, spun eu.
sentences.original: There is nothing here, I say.
Wait a little, says Poirot.
Poirot lights the fire.

sentences.translationRu: Он держит конверт близко к пламени.
sentences.original: He holds the envelope near the flame.
We wait a few minutes.
Suddenly letters appear on the envelope!
It is a secret ink.
Now we can read the words.

sentences.text: Pe plic este un testament adevărat!
sentences.original: On the envelope there is a real will!
The uncle leaves everything to his niece.

sentences.text: Casa și banii sunt pentru Violet.
sentences.original: The house and money are for Violet.

sentences.text: Doi oameni au semnat ca martori.
sentences.original: Two people signed as witnesses.

sentences.text: Sunt Albert Pike și Jessie Pike.
sentences.translationRu: Это Альберт Пайк и Джесси Пайк.
sentences.original: They are Albert Pike and Jessie Pike.
He is a confectioner in town.

sentences.translationRu: — Теперь я всё понимаю, говорит Пуаро.
sentences.original: Now I understand everything, says Poirot.

sentences.text: — Cele două hârtii au fost un truc.
sentences.original: The two forms were a trick.
The real will was on the envelope.

sentences.text: — Stăpânul a mers la cofetar, spune Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: — Хозяин ходил к кондитеру, говорит Пуаро.
sentences.original: The master went to the confectioner, says Poirot.
He asked him to sign the will.
So he hid the real will.

sentences.text: Mergem să o vedem pe Violet.
sentences.original: We go to see Violet.
I have found the will, says Poirot.

sentences.text: — Casa și banii sunt ai tăi.
sentences.original: The house and money are yours.
Violet is very happy.
Thank you, Mr. Poirot! she says.
But Poirot smiles.

sentences.text: — Eu am găsit testamentul, nu tu.
sentences.translationRu: — Это я нашёл завещание, а не вы.
sentences.original: I found the will, not you.

sentences.text: — Unchiul a vrut să arăți mintea ta.
sentences.translationRu: — Дядя хотел, чтобы вы показали свой ум.
sentences.original: Your uncle wanted you to show your wits.

sentences.text: — Deci tu trebuie să dai banii la săraci.
sentences.translationRu: — Значит, деньги вы должны отдать бедным.
sentences.original: So you must give the money to the poor.

sentences.text: Violet râde și este de acord.
sentences.original: Violet laughs and agrees.
You are right, she says.
I will help the poor people.
So the case ends.

sentences.text: Poirot a fost mai deștept decât toți.
sentences.original: Poirot was cleverer than everyone.
